---
title: "Sustainability Practice"
---

## Sustainability Practice

Before transitioning fully into academic research, I worked in applied sustainability, environmental policy, climate adaptation, agriculture, and natural resources across Latin America and the United States.

My practitioner experience continues to inform my scholarship on socio-environmental systems, sustainability education, and decision-making.

## International Policy and Applied Sustainability

### United Nations Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean (ECLAC)

**Consultant** (2015–2017)

Natural Resources and Infrastructure Division & Sustainable Development and Human Settlements Division

Conducted applied policy research at the intersection of climate change, water, agriculture, energy, biodiversity, infrastructure, and sustainable development across Latin America and the Caribbean.

Work included:

- climate adaptation and mitigation policy analysis,
- agricultural supply chains and environmental systems,
- sustainability and infrastructure studies,
- regional seminars, workshops, and stakeholder engagement.

### Environmental Consulting and Development Practice

#### Parity CB — Bolivian Consultants

**Associate Consultant — Agriculture and Environment Team** (2010–2015)

Worked on climate adaptation, agricultural investments, environmental evaluation, governance processes, and rural livelihoods across Bolivia, Peru, and Colombia.

### Applied Environmental Research

#### Louisiana State University — Center of Natural Resources Economics and Policy

**Research Intern** (2008)

Contributed to applied research examining wetland distribution, mapping, and environmental and economic impacts in the United States and Central America.

### Corporate Social Responsibility and Sustainable Development

#### Bolivian Corporate Social Responsibility Foundation (COBORSE)

**Project Assistant** (2009)

Supported corporate social responsibility initiatives, including development of a CSR reference book for Bolivian companies and promotion of United Nations Global Compact commitments within private organizations.

This work contributed to my early experience with sustainability, organizational responsibility, and stakeholder engagement.

## Selected Policy Publications

### United Nations / ECLAC Publications

Bárcena, A., Samaniego, J., Galindo, L. M., Ferrer, J., Alatorre, J. E., Stockins, P., Reyes, O., Sánchez, S., & **Mostacedo-Marasovic, S. J.** (2017). *The economics of climate change in Latin America and the Caribbean: A graphic overview.* Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean. Santiago, Chile. <https://hdl.handle.net/11362/43889>

Samaniego, J., Galindo, L. M., **Mostacedo-Marasovic, S. J.**, Ferrer, J., Alatorre, J. E., & Reyes, O. (2017). *Synthesis of public policies: Mitigation and adaptation to climate change measures in Latin America and the Caribbean.* Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean. Santiago, Chile. <https://hdl.handle.net/11362/45704>

Zanetti, E., Gómez, J. J., **Mostacedo-Marasovic, S. J.**, & Reyes, O. (2017). *Climate change and public forestry policies in Latin America: A preliminary view.* Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean. Santiago, Chile. <https://hdl.handle.net/11362/40922>
